name: Markus Wilson
bio:
Designer experienced in leading the end-to-end design for a range of startups across games, XR and immersive, web, and mobile.

Previously led design on award-winning games such as "BLINNK and the Vacuum of Space", and for startups. Strong advocate for accessibility and research-backed design.
short_bio: Award-winning designer across game UI, XR, mobile, and web
